visual_description: A man with dark hair sits in the driver’s seat of a car, his right hand wrapped in a white bandage and pressed against his nose. His gaze is directed forward, and his head is slightly turned to his left. The interior of the car is visible, with gray upholstery and a window showing blurred greenery outside.
